name: rf-eda-lna-agent
description: Configurable RF/LNA EDA workflow skill for exploration trees, simulation evidence, EM audits, layout growth, and signoff readiness.

interface.shortDescription: Manage RF/LNA EDA goals, harnesses, evidence, and signoff readiness.
interface.longDescription: A configurable Codex skill for RF/LNA EDA workflows. It collects user-defined metrics, creates project goals, maintains exploration trees, runs bounded harnesses, audits evidence, and reports signoff readiness without assuming a specific process or target.
defaultPrompt: Create an RF EDA project goal from my metrics.
Audit this RF candidate's evidence and blockers.
Build a harness plan for my LNA workflow.
